interface.longDescription:
AccuWeather® provides hyper-local weather forecasts with real-time alerts and detailed updates. Access Minute-by-Minute® precipitation forecasts, hourly and daily forecasts, and severe weather notifications.

Use features including MinuteCast®, RealFeel®, RealFeel Shade™ Temperature, and live radar to monitor current and upcoming conditions wherever you are.

Widget Features:
- Current Conditions
- MinuteCast™
- Today/Tonight 
- Hourly Forecast (12 hrs)
- Daily Forecast (10 days)
- Government Alerts
- Radar
defaultPrompt: Best day to run this weekend
